name: Sinigang Na Manok (Chicken in Sour Broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 2.5 to 3 pounds of chicken fryer, cut into pieces.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of cooking oil in a large saucepan.
3. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
4. Add sliced onion and cook until translucent.
5. Add sliced tomatoes and cook until softened.
6. Add salt, patis (fish sauce), and pepper to taste.
7. Pour in 5 cups of water.
8. Add 5-6 medium sampaloc pods or about half a package of tamarind powder.
9. Add cut radish pieces (or chopped red radishes) and mustard greens (or water cress, spinach, cabbage).
10. Stir the mixture to combine all ingredients.
11. Bring to a simmer and cook for 30 minutes until the chicken is tender.
12. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
13. Serve hot over steamed rice or with noodles.
Preparation Time: 10 minutes Cooking Time: 50 minutes Serves: 4-5
